Joint Motion For Court Approval Of Settlement Of Paga Claims

DEFENDANTS SHIHADEH INVESTMENTS, INC., MALCOLM BROWNSON, BASSAM SHIHADEH and SKKY PHILLIPS' Joint Motion For Court Approval Of Settlement Of Paga Claims is granted. No opposition from the Labor and Workforce Development Agency and good cause shown. Order signed.
